title: How Iran is using China’s playbook to counter Donald Trump’s threats
content: Nearly six weeks of fighting between Iran and the United States have paused, but tensions remain after talks failed. Donald Trump has increased pressure by threatening to block the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil route. Iran is responding by using control of the strait as leverage, similar to how China earlier countered US pressure using rare-earth supplies. This has already pushed oil prices higher and raised concerns over fuel costs and inflation. Iran has shown no sign of backing down, signalling a longer standoff ahead

title: J&K: Sighting of terror suspects prompts search ops in Kathua
content: Two armed terror suspects were reportedly spotted in Jammu and Kashmir's Kathua district, prompting extensive search operations by security forces in multiple border areas. The duo, carrying heavy backpacks, was seen moving towards the forests of Ambanall. Despite a joint cordon-and-search operation, no trace of the suspects was found.

title: 1, W, 0, W, 0, W: Praful's dream IPL debut nurtured by Aaron, McGrath
content: Praful Hinge’s dream IPL debut, where he rattled Rajasthan Royals with four wickets, is a story of resilience and self-belief. After a career-threatening back injury, the Vidarbha pacer found support in Varun Aaron and Glenn McGrath, who guided his comeback. The seamer picked up four wickets on his IPL debut.

title: Why Anthropic’s Google deal should make Nvidia and its CEO Jensen Huang nervous
content: Anthropic has signed one of the largest compute deals in AI history—committing to multiple gigawatts of TPU capacity from Google and Broadcom, potentially worth hundreds of billions of dollars. The agreement, running through 2031, is a major endorsement of Google's in-house chips over Nvidia's GPUs. As the AI industry shifts from model training to inference, purpose-built chips are getting cheaper and more competitive—and Nvidia is feeling the pressure from every direction.

title: Wangchuk renews push for talks, says Ladakh 'hangs between trust and mistrust'
content: Environmentalist Sonam Wangchuk urged the Centre to resume dialogue on Ladakh's key issues, expressing concern over a growing trust deficit. He highlighted that over two months have passed since the last talks, allowing divisive elements to exploit the gap. Wangchuk appealed to the Prime Minister and Home Minister to take timely measures for national interest.

title: J&K: Last tonga in Srinagar rolls again, 70-year-old keeps past alive
content: Ghulam Rasool Kumar, a 70-year-old tonga driver, has returned to Srinagar's streets after a hiatus, becoming a nostalgic spectacle for tourists and locals alike. Despite facing disruptions due to a terrorist attack, he continues to offer rides, his horse-drawn cart a poignant reminder of the city's past amidst modern traffic.

title: FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
content: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.

title: Who is Praful Hinge? 3 wickets in 1 over! SRH debutant who destroyed RR
content: Twenty-four-year-old pacer Praful Hinge made an explosive IPL debut for Sunrisers Hyderabad, dismantling Rajasthan Royals' top order. He claimed three wickets for ducks in a single over, including Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel, and Lhuan-dre Pretorius. This stunning performance, achieved on his first IPL outing, left the opposition reeling and introduced a new talent to the league.

title: TCS CEO on IT dying by 2030: Companies will need more services for AI
content: TCS CEO K Krithivasan dismisses predictions of India's IT sector becoming obsolete by 2030, asserting that AI will amplify the need for IT services. He highlights the industry's resilience due to deep skill sets, not just cost.

title: Ambedkar Jayanti: wishes, messages, quotes, images, Facebook & WhatsApp status
content: India honors Dr. B.R. Ambedkar on April 14th, celebrating his pivotal role in shaping the nation and its constitution. Ambedkar Jayanti commemorates his fight against social discrimination and his vision for an equal, just society. The day inspires citizens to uphold democratic values and strive for progress through education and unity.

title: Rueben Bain Jr draft buzz rises after Miami crash death details emerge
content: Rueben Bain Jr., a top NFL Draft prospect, is back in focus after reports confirmed he drove in a 2024 crash that led to Destiny Betts’ death. The accident involved teammates and raised questions, though her family called it a tragic accident. Meanwhile, Bain’s strong season and ACC award keep him a high draft pick.

title: NFL reporter Melanie Collins stuns fans with offseason beach snap
content: Melanie Collins closed her eighth NFL season with CBS after covering the NFC Championship Game, continuing her steady rise as a trusted sideline reporter. Working alongside Kevin Harlan and Trent Green, she has become a consistent presence in high-profile broadcasts. With a background that includes ESPN, Yahoo Sports, and major global events, Collins brings depth and versatility to her role. As the offseason begins, she is taking time away before an expected return for the next NFL season.

title: Mike Vrabel faces backlash amid Dianna Russini hot tub scandal
content: New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel skipped a scheduled media session amid controversy involving Dianna Russini, following photos of them together in Arizona. While both denied any inappropriate relationship, Russini faces an internal review at The Athletic. Fans questioned Vrabel’s absence, calling it evasive, though some believe it was a strategic move to avoid distractions as the team focuses on upcoming draft preparations.

title: Dianna Russini faces backlash after old comments on husband resurface
content: Dianna Russini faces mounting backlash after old podcast comments about her marriage resurfaced amid viral photos with Mike Vrabel. While both deny any wrongdoing, public reaction has blurred the line between personal humor and professional credibility. The Athletic has defended Russini, but an internal review signals the seriousness of the situation as scrutiny continues to grow.

title: Praful Hinge scripts history in 19 years of IPL, becomes first-ever to ...
content: Debutant Praful Hinge etched his name in IPL history with a sensational opening over, claiming three wickets for ducks against Rajasthan Royals. The 24-year-old seamer from Vidarbha, picked for Rs 30 lakh, showcased remarkable potential, justifying Sunrisers Hyderabad's faith and announcing himself as a rising star.

title: Happy Rongali Bihu: Top 50 wishes, messages and quotes to share
content: Rongali Bihu, also known as Bohag Bihu, marks the Assamese New Year and the arrival of spring, celebrated with great fervor in Assam. This festival embodies freshness, prosperity, and nature's rejuvenation, fostering gratitude, relationships, and happiness. As Rongali Bihu 2026 approaches, it's a time to share warm wishes and messages of joy and new beginnings.

title: Don Tzu and the art of war (only winning, no losing)
content: Today we bear witness to said winning, in a way that greatest strategic philosophers of yore: Chanakya, Machiavelli, and obviously Sun Tzu could never have conceived.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi falls for golden duck; Kavya Maran's wild celebration goes viral
content: Youngster Vaibhav Sooryavanshi faced a rare failure in the IPL 2026 clash against Sunrisers Hyderabad. He was dismissed for a golden duck by pacer Praful Hinge. Wicketkeeper Ishan Kishan and Salil Arora combined for the catch. The Sunrisers Hyderabad dugout, including owner Kavya Maran, erupted in celebration. Sooryavanshi walked back to the pavilion in disbelief after an uncharacteristic off day.

title: 'Cherry tomatoes and beets': World's oldest captive gorilla celebrates 69th birthday at Berlin Zoo
content: Fatou, the world's oldest captive gorilla, celebrated her 69th birthday at the Berlin Zoo with a special, sugar-free meal. Arriving in 1959, she is a western lowland gorilla whose exact birth date is unknown but officially celebrated on April 13. Despite her age and health challenges, Fatou remains friendly with her keepers.

title: Jadeja inpects Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's bat, asks 'Ye tune karwaya hai ki ... ' - WATCH
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is making waves in IPL 2026 with his aggressive batting, earning him the Orange Cap.  His explosive partnership with Yashasvi Jaiswal is a key highlight for Rajasthan Royals.  Sooryavanshi is also nearing a significant T20 milestone, showcasing remarkable talent and a fearsome strike rate.

title: Trump’s blockade of Strait of Hormuz begins: How will India be impacted?
content: The Strait of Hormuz is a narrow stretch which is important for global trade flows, and is alone responsible for the transit of a fifth of the world’s oil supply. Asian economies like India and China source a big chunk of their crude oil, LPG, and LNG requirements via this strait.

title: Abhishek Sharma breaks Rohit Sharma, Sanju Samson 'unwanted' records
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad's Abhishek Sharma was dismissed for a golden duck by Jofra Archer in their IPL 2026 clash against Rajasthan Royals. This marked the 24th instance of RR taking a wicket before conceding a run, an IPL record.

title: Blocking what is already closed: Why Trump is blockading Hormuz Strait
content: President Trump has threatened to blockade the Strait of Hormuz. This move aims to increase pressure on Iran. The waterway is crucial for global oil shipments. Iran has already been limiting access. Trump's action risks further disruption to oil flows. This could lead to higher global oil prices. The US has previously allowed some Iranian oil sales.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' day 26: Ranveer Singh film chases Rs 1100 crore milestone on 4th Monday
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', continues its record-shattering journey at the box office. On day 26 (fourth Monday), the Ranveer Singh-starrer has officially amassed over Rs 1,084 crore India net, solidifying its status as the highest-grossing Hindi film in history. Despite the intense IPL 2026 season, the film's strategic family-friendly edits and viral momentum have pushed its worldwide gross past the Rs 1,712 crore mark. Check out the detailed live tracking and daily collection breakdown here.

title: Happy Puthandu: Top 50 Tamil new year wishes & quotes to share with your loved ones
content: Puthandu, the Tamil New Year, ushers in a period of hope, prosperity, and new beginnings. Celebrated globally by Tamil communities, it involves home cleaning, festive meals, and temple visits. As Puthandu 2026 approaches on April 14, heartfelt wishes and messages are shared to convey warmth and joy, emphasizing gratitude and cultural pride.

title: 'Under Sanju bhaiya ... ': Riyan Parag's special mention for Samson at toss
content: Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag, reflecting on his journey to leadership, acknowledged the guidance of former captain Sanju Samson. Parag, who took over captaincy ahead of IPL 2026, expressed gratitude for the support received. Sunrisers Hyderabad skipper Ishan Kishan also discussed the impact of leadership on his game and team performance.

title: Out of missiles: US allies in Gulf turn to Asia for more ammo
content: Gulf nations, facing depleted air defence stockpiles due to sustained air bombardment, are urgently seeking alternative weapons suppliers beyond the US. Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar are exploring options from South Korea, Ukraine, and Britain, driven by Iranian retaliatory attacks and US delivery delays. This diversification highlights global arms production strains and a shifting defence landscape.

title: From Rs 60 to Rs 60,000: Study reveals Jallianwala compensation scale, sparks ‘blood money’ debate
content: A study reveals Jallianwala Bagh compensation was calculated by income and dependents, leading to payouts from a few thousand rupees for deaths to under Rs 100 for minor injuries. This formula, linking life value to economic productivity, sparked public debate over "blood money" and colonial accountability.

title: 7th duck of 2026! Abhishek Sharma falls for golden duck against Rajasthan Royals
content: Abhishek Sharma was dismissed for a golden duck by Jofra Archer on the first ball against Rajasthan Royals. This marked his seventh duck in 2026 T20 innings, the most by any player this year. He joins Shikhar Dhawan as the only Sunrisers Hyderabad batters to be out first-ball in an IPL match.

title: From middle finger moment to double over Gukesh: What is next for Nihal?
content: Indian chess prodigy Nihal Sarin brushed off an online opponent’s rude gesture earlier this year, focusing instead on his game. Since then, he has surged in form, reaching a career-high rating of 2723, winning the Menorca Masters, and beating world champion D Gukesh twice. He will now aim to qualify for the Esports World Cup 2026.

title: Our annual NFL draft prospect skill superlative list: The one player who excels at each trait
content: Strongest arm? Fastest offensive and defensive playmakers? Quickest first step? Let's hand out superlatives for this NFL draft class.

title: College coaches pick 2026 NFL draft sleepers
content: We know the top talent in the draft, but who could surprise in the pros? We asked their college coaches.

title: Haliburton details frustrating battle with shingles
content: Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton opened up about his battle with shingles, saying it slowed the recovery of his torn Achilles.

title: Report: Ex-Canes DE Bain drove in fatal car crash
content: Former Miami defensive end and 2026 NFL draft prospect Rueben Bain Jr. was involved in an auto accident in 2024 in which a passenger later died because of injuries sustained in the crash, according to a report published on Sunday.

title: Sources: Malone's UNC lands transfer Avdalas
content: Virginia Tech transfer Neoklis Avdalas has committed to North Carolina, sources told ESPN, giving new coach Michael Malone his first big addition with the Tar Heels.

title: Veteran goaltender Quick, 40, says he's retiring
content: Jonathan Quick says he is retiring at age 40 after nearly two decades in the NHL, a stretch during which he was one of the best goaltenders of his generation.

title: Reeling Astros place Pena, Imai on injury list
content: The Astros continue to be snakebit as shortstop Jeremy Pena (hamstring) and starting pitcher Tatsuya Imai (arm fatigue) both were placed on the injury list.

title: Crawford found guilty of careless driving, fined
content: Terence Crawford was found guilty of careless driving Monday and ordered to pay a $75 fine stemming from a traffic stop last year during which police ordered the world champion boxer and passengers out of his vehicle at gunpoint.

title: Russell delivers 'video game' vibe to Tide offense
content: Alabama QB Keelon Russell, a five-star recruit in 2025 who redshirted last season, gave a "video game" feel to the Crimson Tide's offense in the spring game.

content: We're going to name a bat flip champion for 2026. Here's who holds the championship belt after the first battle of the season.

content: From teammates and opponents to coaches, officials and staff, those who were there remember how Bryant's last game became something no one expected -- and no one will forget.

content: When New York and L.A. collide this week, big-money baseball will be on display at a never-seen-before level.

content: WNBA free agency is here. Kelsey Plum is returning to Los Angeles. Kayla McBride is returning to Minnesota.

content: Tracking news and updates for players entering -- and exiting -- the transfer portal for the 2026-27 season.

content: Our panel of PHWA voters identify their finalists for all the awards, with some tight finishes in a few spots.

content: Man City's win at Chelsea and Arsenal's defeat at Bournemouth have thrown the title race wide open -- arguably, it's City's to lose from here. PLUS: Inter Milan show win a seven-goal thriller at Como as Gab Marcotti recaps the weekend.

content: Odds for next four golf majors: 2026 PGA Championship, U.S. Open and the Open Championship, 2027 Masters.

content: The heavyweight division is buzzing again thanks to Tyson Fury calling out Anthony Joshua and Deontay Wilder's return.

title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC's first loss of 2026 knocks them off the top
content: LAFC had been practically perfect in 2026, but the Angelenos first loss of the year cleared room for a new No. 1 in this edition of MLS Power Rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Nine Premier League clubs eye Leicester wonderkid
content: Around half the teams in the Premier League want to sign Leicester City winger Jeremy Monga. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: India Gets Iranian Oil For First Time In 7 Years: Report
content: The Iran-flagged Felicity has reached Sikka Port in western India, while the Curacao-flagged Jaya is at the eastern port of Odisha, the data shows.

title: "You Treat Muslims Like Cattle": Asaduddin Owaisi On Mamata Banerjee
content: "Did the Trinamool not facilitate the BJP's first parliamentary victory in 1998 and 1999? Subsequently, you (Mamata Banerjee) became the Railway Minister," Asaduddin Owaisi said

title: Adani Green Energy Achieves Highest ESG Score Among Indian Companies
content: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has received a CareEdge-ESG 1+ rating with a score of 87.3 from CARE ESG Ratings Limited (CareEdge-ESG), a Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) registered ESG rating provider.

title: Vijay's Cycle Campaign Draws Eyeballs In Tamil Nadu, Critics Say "Stunt"
content: Back in the 2021 elections, Vijayfamously arrived on a bicycle to cast his vote, drawing widespread attention.

title: I-PAC Co-Founder Vinesh Chandel Arrested In Case Linked To Bengal Coal Scam
content: The ED case is linked to a first information report (FIR) filed by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) in November 2020 that alleged a coal pilferage in Eastern Coalfields Ltd's mines in West Bengal

title: 16-Year-Old Girl, Tortured And Assaulted By Human Traffickers In UP, Rescued
content: A girl from Chakradharpur sub-division of Jharkhand's West Singhbhum district fell victim to human traffickers and was allegedly sold for Rs 25,000 in Uttar Pradesh, police said on Monday.

title: Meta To Surpass Google In Global Digital Ad Revenue For First Time: Report
content: The Instagram-owner's global net ad revenues are expected to reach $243.46 billion in 2026, ahead of Google's projected $239.54 billion, the market research firm said.

title: 'He's Wrong, Very Weak On Crime': Trump Refuses To Apologise To Pope Leo
content: "There's nothing to apologise for. He's wrong," Trump told reporters, a day after a social media post and comments slamming the US-born pope.

title: BJP Slams Revanth Reddy Over His Comments On North-South Divide Concerns
content: Telangana BJP spokesperson NV Subash termed Revanth Reddy's comment as "misleading and opportunistic"

title: F-35B Lightning II Jets, MV-22 Ospreys, 15 Warships: Trump's Hormuz Arsenal
content: US President Donald Trump warned on Monday that any Iranian fast-attack ships approaching the blockade would be destroyed.

title: Kerala Murder Convict Arrested In Mumbai, Was Posing As Ragpicker: Cops
content: A murder convict from Kerala, who escaped from a hospital last year and was hiding in Mumbai disguised as a ragpicker, was arrested from near a train station by the Railway Protection Force (RPF), a police official said on Monday.

title: Sunetra Pawar Launches Baramati Bypoll Campaign With Emotional Tribute
content: Sunetra Pawar said there were questions about her ability to take on responsibility, but support from the people of Baramati gave her the strength to move forward.

title: "We Wrote To BJP": RG Kar Victim's Mother On Her Candidature From Bengal
content: Ratna Debnath is an ordinary woman with no prior connection to politics. Yet she now finds herself in the electoral arena.

title: Decoding Tamil Nadu Elections: The Numbers Game With Rahul Kanwal
content: Traditionally, Tamil Nadu has shown strong swings in change of power every five years. Would MK Stalin's DMK be able to hold on to power, or Vijay's TVK reshape the contest entirely?

title: Trump's Iran Blockade Sees "Elimination" Warning, "Pure Propaganda" Retort
content: In a social media post on Monday, Trump claimed that Iran's navy had already been largely destroyed in the fighting, with 158 ships sunk.

title: Assam's Gen-Z Candidate's Mother Writes To Women's Panel Over Himanta Sarma
content: A formal complaint has been lodged with the National Commission for Women (NCW) against Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma, alleging false, defamatory, and misleading statements made during an election campaign, along with subsequent online harassment.

title: US-Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: Deadline Ends For Trump's Hormuz Naval Blockade, Iranian Ports
content: US-Iran-Israel War LIVE: US President Donald Trump said that Iran "lies" as they had promised to open the Strait of Hormuz but did not.

title: US Called Netanyahu From Islamabad. He Says, "The Explosion Came From..."
content: The call, according to Benjamin Netanyahu, was made by JD Vance from his plane en route back from the Pakistani capital.

title: NATO Allies Refuse To Join Trump's Strait of Hormuz Blockade Plan
content: NATO allies including Britain and France said they would not be drawn into the conflict by taking part in the blockade, saying instead that it was vital to open the waterway through which one-fifth of the world's oil usually passes.

title: The Complex Role Of Hezbollah As Lebanon-Israel Diplomacy Intensifies
content: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun last week decried Hezbollah for showing "no regard for the interests of Lebanon or the lives of its people."

title: Inventory of jewels in inner chamber of Jagannath Temple in Puri begins after 48 years
content: Team of goldsmiths, RBI representatives, priests carrying out exercise on orders of the Orissa HC after concerns were raised over safety of jewels

title: Punjab Assembly passes Bill with strict provisions against acts of sacrilege
content: Draft law to ensure swift probe, make offences non-bailable, impose punishment up to life term in prison and fine up to ₹25 lakh, says CM; SGPC calls for effective implementation of legislation

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Slow progress of infrastructure work, unemployment frustrate voters of Mayiladuthurai constituency
content: Be it the ₹83.03-crore underground sewerage project, the ₹29.01-crore Perunthalaivar Kamarajar Bus Stand of the Sarangapani flyover, poor planning and execution remain the common factors; the government hospital in the district headquarters lacks basic facilities

title: T.N. Assembly election: Jayalalithaa would have opposed delimitation if she were alive, says Stalin
content: The Chief Minister reasons she would have taken firm action and opposed issues that deprive T.N. of its rights, as when she opposed GST and NEET. He criticises the present day AIADMK, which is the main Opposition party, for not raising its voice on such issues

title: Three-day parole for ‘Savukku’ Shankar to attend mother’s funeral
content: The parole was sanctioned after a petition was submitted by Mr. Shankar’s counsel on April 13, 2026, stating that the detenu’s mother had passed away on Monday

title: Resign as PM if you want to be BJP’s face in West Bengal, CM Mamata tells Modi
content: At a public meeting in Siliguri, the Prime Minister had said all BJP candidates contesting the Assembly election were “Modi”; it was a counter to the Chief Minister’s remark that she was the candidate on all 294 seats

title: If BJP were playing petty politics, Tamil Nadu would not have got first PM Mitra Park, says Piyush Goyal
content: Union Minister accuses Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M.K. Stalin “and his ilk” of promoting a false narrative on the issue

content: The Jammu and Kashmir Police registered a First Information Report (FIR) at Ramsoo Police Station; four accused have been detained

content: An official said Chandel was taken into custody under the provisions of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) in Delhi late evening

title: Disruptions in cooking gas, diesel supply continue to affect fisheries sector
content: Around 2,000 engaged in fishing-related work at Thoppumpady harbour hit as deep-sea vessels, including gillnet, longline, and trawl boats, remain idle

title: Supreme Court notice to Centre, Election Commission on plea to bring in iris, biometric verification of voters at polling booths
content: A Bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant considers the financial implications of implementing such a mechanism, but says it will consider the plea before the next General Election

title: Engineering student dies in explosive device blast during trek near Chennai
content: Police said the incident occurred around when a group of six students climbed a hill located near Anumanthapuram firing range without permission

title: Resisting delimitation can be more harmful for southern States
content: The BJP’s proposal is to have 50% additional seats in the Lok Sabha, one-third of the new total being reserved for women, nationally and in each State; for instance, Kerala, which at present has 20 seats, will have 30 seats, of which ten will be reserved for women.

title: University faculty recruitment in A.P. to begin soon
content: The government has indicated that recruitment may commence in the third week of May, says Andhra University Vice-Chancellor G.P. Raja Sekhar

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Total turnout goes up to 79.63% after factoring in postal ballots
content: These are provisional numbers with service votes yet to be added; Chief Electoral Officer (Kerala) Rathan U. Kelkar rejects allegations of undue delay in the publication of the complete poll data

title: Russia offers to take in Iran's enriched uranium
content: Failed talks between Iran and the United States over the weekend dashed hopes of a swift deal to permanently end the war that has killed thousands and thrown the global economy into turmoil since it began in late February

title: The simple, spiritual living in Andhra’s Kurma Gramam village
content: Nestled amidst the scenic hills of Hiramandalam in Andhra Pradesh, Kurma Gramam is a tiny hamlet, spread across 60 acres and inhabited by 17 families that stands in contrast to modern lifestyles. Cut off from the contemporary living, the village functions without electricity, mobile phones, internet connectivity or even LPG services. Life here moves at a slower pace, deeply rooted in simplicity and spiritual discipline, writes Harish Gilai

title: T.N. Assembly elections: Reach out to voters at grassroots level, Modi tells BJP cadre
content: Workers should also speak to beneficiaries of government schemes and record their experiences to build trust among voters, he says

title: Will Panneerselvam turn over a new leaf under the Rising Sun in Bodinayakkanur?
content: While his supporters are at pains to highlight the circumstances that compelled him to switch to the DMK from the AIADMK, the ruling party workers are yet to embrace him in a big way. He is also facing criticism in his native Theni district for not bringing in big infrastructure projects

title: Bulge on dividers near metro pillars on ORR raise safety concerns
content: At several stretches along the ORR where metro construction is under way, the central divider appears to bulge outward around pillar bases, narrowing the usable carriageway

title: Workers’ protest over wage hike leads to unrest, violent face-off in Noida
content: U.P. forms high-level committee to resolve industrial discord; U.P. CM Yogi Adityanath appeals to workers to be wary of those attempting to spread industrial unrest; trade unions see link between protests and the implementation of the government’s four Labour Codes

content: Chief Minister reviews the performance of various departments; instructs that crimes against women must be dealt with strictly and without delay; proposes pilot projects to deliver healthcare services through drones in agency areas to improve accessibility

title: A.P. to launch 62 new Anna Canteens in rural areas
content: Chief Minister to formally inaugurate the second phase of Anna Canteens on April 15 at Dharanikota in the Pedakurapadu constituency of Palnadu district

title: SRM Medical College Hospital launches Genetic Clinic
content: The clinic offers services like phenotype-based clinical assessment, appropriate genetic test selection, clinical interpretation of diagnostic results

title: India to see ‘below normal’ monsoon, says India Meteorological Department
content: El Nino conditions are likely after June, the IMD said. Historically, six out of 10 El Nino years have been linked to depressed rainfall over India.

title: Maoist killed in Bastar; first instance after March 31 deadline
content: The deceased Maoist, Rupi, an area committee level member, hailed from Telangana and police say she is the last active “Telugu Maoist cadre in Bastar”

title: State Census offices told to monitor online narratives
content: Officials and field staff should look into adverse comments about the ongoing exercise and counter false information, Census Commissioner tells State Directorates; first phase under way in eight States and Union Territories

title: U.S., Israel met ‘strategic defeat’ in Iran, says Ambassador Fathali
content: The Envoy said the U.S. side made "unlawful" demands during the talks that led to the negotiations ending without results

content: "SIR of electoral rolls is a 'major issue' in the upcoming West Bengal Assembly polls, and stated that the people have resolved to throw infiltrators out of the State," says Mr. Shah

title: Police will extend all help to surrendered naxalites, says DGP
content: The Director General of Police interacted with Maoists who gave up arms  and appreciated the surrendered extremists for leading a peaceful life

title: Traders raise concerns over H-FAST raids in Begum Bazar
content: At a meeting with police and food safety officials, Begum Bazar traders sought proportionate action, better coordination and lab testing before filing cases, while authorities defended strict enforcement against rising food adulteration

title: Coimbatore cable TV operator arrested for telecasting leaked footage of Jana Nayagan
content: The complainant alleged that the movie was broadcast for up to 21 minutes post the interval on March 11, following which TVK cadre intervened.

title: Three Nigerians booked for participating in Trinamool  Congress election rally in Kolkata
content: Police say trio took part out of curiosity; BJP writes to CEO seeking action against Trinamool candidate.

title: Nirmala Sitharaman, Stalin feud online over Centre’s letter on paddy incentive
content: The two leaders were at loggerheads over a January 9 communication of the Union Finance Ministry, regarding paddy incentive, which was sent to the Chief Secretaries of all States

title: An Asha Bhosle collection lives in all of us
content: While not jumping with joy seeing every dog that comes her way (to the bewilderment of the dog owner and the dog), Haimanti fantasizes about fantasy books or classics to read and re-read. That could be the gist of it all, except for the aroma of biryani the beckons; or that story idea that's stuck in the head and refuses to go till it's penned down. Read More

title: Vikram's 'hop' unravels surficial 'layers' near lunar south pole region
content: Chethan Kumar is a Senior Assistant Editor with the Times of India. Aside from specialising in Space & Science, he has reported extensively on varied topics, with special focus on defence, policy and data stories. He has covered multiple elections, too. As a young democracy grows out of adolescence, Chethan feels, there are reels of tales emerging which need to be captured. To do this, he alternates between the mundane goings-on of the Common Man and the wonder-filled worlds of scientists and scamsters, politicians and soldiers. In a career spanning nearly 18 years, he has reported from multiple datelines — Houston, Florida, Kochi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Sriharikota (AP), NH-1 (J&K Highway), New Delhi, Ahmedabad, Raichur, Bhatkal, Mysuru, Chamarajanagar, to name a few —  but is based out of Bengaluru, India’s science capital that also hosts the ISRO HQ. Read More

title: Week 9: Top 25 rankings, best moments and what to watch
content: despite being pushed to extra innings, the sport is giving us the best of everything . UCLA isn't relinquishing the top spot yet as the Bruins remain steady at no. 1 . despite winning the series over the Longhorns, Texas A&M rose up eight spots to break into the top 10 for the first time this season .

title: Iran offers navigation support to India in Hormuz amid US blockade; rejects charging toll
content: the TOI Business Desk is a vigilant and dedicated team of journalists committed to delivering the latest and most relevant business news from around the world to readers of the Times of India . the desk ensures that TOI readers are well-informed about the ever-changing and dynamic world of commerce .

title: Top 10 WrestleMania moments: From double turns to the end of the streak
content: "Showcase of the Immortals" has a long history of creating moments fans will never forget . we combed through more than 450 matches across 42 WrestleManias to rank the 10 greatest moments . the voting committee fought tooth and nail for tuesday .

title: The case for the Ted Lindsay Award as the NHL's MVP trophy of record
content: Connor McDavid scored a hat trick in a win over San Jose . the Hart Trophy shouldn't be the MVP trophy of record in the NHL . he wants the Lindsay to be considered the top MVP award .

title: Only Klopp, Luis Enrique can fix Real Madrid ... and that's a problem
content: real madrid face bayern munich in the second leg of their UEFA Champions League quarterfinal second leg . they are nine points adrift of laLiga leaders Barcelona and were knocked out of the Copa del Rey in the round of 16 against second-tier Albacete . if they fail to overturn a 2-1 deficit away at Bayern on Wednesday, they will face a second successive season without a major trophy .

title: Who should challenge for Carlos Ulberg's championship first?
content: Carlos Ulberg knocked out former champion Ji Procházka in the first round at uFC 327 to claim the title in his 10th consecutive victory . the only problem is that he also appeared to have suffered a leg injury that could put his immediate title defense in jeopardy . here are some possible scenarios for Ulberg and athletes who earned statement wins in Miami .

title: WNBA trade grades: Grading Sky's latest move, Rickea Jackson's fit
content: it has been a busy week of WNBA free agency . it started off when Angel Reese was traded to the Atlanta Dream . the sky finished tied for last in the league at 10-34 . veteran guard Ariel Atkins is headed back to LA .

title: Fight grades: Nearly every UFC 327 bout exceeds expectations
content: it's no secret that the UFC has been in a slump since the start of 2026 and in dire need of a fight card that could remind fans why it is the best mixed martial arts promotion in the world . there was one lousy fight on the card ( Dominick Reyes vs. Johnny Walker ). it will be largely forgotten thanks to Carlos Ulberg's dramatic knockout of Ji Procházka to capture the light heavyweight championship .

title: Free agent pickups: Need help at catcher? Here's where to look
content: catchers have posted a collective OPS 33 points lower than the league's average in the category this century . in the past 25 non-shortened seasons, catchers accounted for only 10 of the 625 total seasons with 450-plus fantasy points among hitters . a pair of youngsters have shown enough pop at the plate to poten .

title: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
content: the 2026 playoffs are set to begin on saturday . the playoff bracket isn't set yet . eight teams from each conference reach the first round and face off in a best-of-seven series to advance .

title: Sago third woman picked to ref in NBA playoffs
content: the list of 36 officials selected to work this season's play-in tournament and first round of the playoffs . referee Natalie Sago is on the list, making her the third woman in league history to be picked for postseason work . she was arriving at the airport when the call came in .

title: Fantasy baseball news: Baltimore's injuries continue to mount
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the young catcher has started seven of the Kansas City Royals last nine contests and homered three times . his whiff rate is of concern, especially considering he had a 28.3% strikeout rate while with Triple-A Omaha last season .
